response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, including PostgreSQL-relevant SQL skills. However, his recent focus leans toward AI-agent infrastructure and Dlang, which may not align closely with the role's renewable energy/construction tech stack needs. His overqualification for an entry-level role and lack of direct experience with REST APIs or Kubernetes for renewable energy workflows are key concerns.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple domains
Proven scalability and performance work with high-traffic systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; recent work skews toward AI/agent systems rather than traditional web development
Limited direct experience with React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL in the context of energy/construction platforms
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with preference for tool-agnostic, language-agnostic roles

key_factors.factor: Direct experience with energy/construction tech stacks or workflows
Proximity to renewable energy/construction tech domain
